problem.summary: Compare scalar/dequantized INT8 matmul, DP4A-style custom kernels, and library INT8 Matrix Core paths with explicit scale and output contracts.
constraints: Template-only; record signedness, layout, scale placement, accumulator type, and output cast
Separate DP4A fallback from IMFMA/Matrix Core paths
Fair hipBLASLt/Composable Kernel/MIGraphX comparison requires same math/output contract

verification.method: Implement the baseline, optimized candidate, and CPU or library oracle; compare all outputs across edge cases before timing claims.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as a template-only task. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
